header.label: Selected work
header.title: Platforms and products
header.intro: National-scale systems and production software — not mockups.

recycle.alt: Recycle.mk — national recycling platform with interactive map
recycle.title: Recycle.mk — National Recycling Platform
recycle.desc: The most comprehensive recycling web application in North Macedonia. Recycle.mk connects citizens, licensed recyclers, municipalities and four national waste-management systems through one interactive platform — with geolocation, photo reporting and real-time status tracking.

tradeflow.altHero: TradeFlow — Logistics. Made. Easier. Customs and cargo operations platform
tradeflow.altWorkflows: TradeFlow cases page and create case workflow
tradeflow.altPreview: TradeFlow hero — Logistics made easier with command center dashboard
tradeflow.title: TradeFlow — Customs & Logistics Command Center
tradeflow.desc: TradeFlow modernizes outdated customs and logistics desktop systems into a responsive web platform for freight forwarders, shipping agencies and trade companies. One unified workspace for declarations, shipment cases, documents, validation workflows and operational analytics.

dashboard.title: Unified dashboard
dashboard.desc: Real-time overview of open declarations, cleared shipments, import/export/transit volumes and weekly trends.

cases.title: Shipment case management
cases.desc: Full registry with case types, senders, receivers, status tracking and detailed case views.

creation.title: 3-step case creation
creation.desc: Guided workflow for declaration setup, economic operator data, shipment details and document uploads.

declarations.title: Declaration workflows
declarations.desc: 5-step declaration builder with transport, goods, financial data, items, documents and validation engine.

analytics.title: Analytics & reports
analytics.desc: Operational visibility through statistics, reports and live timeline for customs clearance tracking.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base & tools
knowledge.desc: Built-in guides, workspace settings and assistant dock for day-to-day logistics operations.
